Session 1
In this training, Dean is going to show you a secret launch process that he has never taught in all his years of teaching. With this sequencing that has
made Dean and his companies tens of millions of dollars over the years, you will now understand how to launch your small group, workshop or
mastermind to the world confidently. This is a proprietary blueprint Dean has discovered with over a decade of trial and error. And a ton of success as
well!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Think through your first 7 days and how you can hype a “big announcement” or “huge update” to your followers.
Remember that days 8‐14 are value videos to your followers and that your goal is to let them know you understand their obstacles and
know how to help.
Remember that after a few value emails it is time for your sales to open. This is when your followers can start ordering or applying for
your event.
Make note that after your sales open, it is 3‐7 days of follow up emails delivering more value and trying to get someone to take action.
The last step to remember is sending people to your order page or application page and getting people to take action before this offer
is gone forever.
